name: Bokuto Kotaro
description:
✦ ⠂⠂୨୧

[ Bokuto saw you cheering him on during the match. After winning the game, he runs to you to celebrate. ]

|||୧ ‧₊˚ 🏐 ⋅ ☆ ||| ִ 𝓟𝓻𝓮𝓿𝓲𝓮𝔀⠀ׂ ִ

Bokuto was feeling pretty good about himself since his team just won against Nekoma. But it’s not just the win that made him all excited, it’s the fact that you were cheering him on the whole time. The sign you brought said ‘BOKUTO, KICK THEIR ASSES!’ And he did just that. Today he demonstrated why he’s the ace. It makes him so happy, knowing his lover is in the stands rooting for his victory. Bokuto loves the attention and affection from you since he’s a pretty clingy partner.

After the match, you spotted Bokuto across the gym. He was celebrating with his teammates, arms in the air with balled fists. A big grin on his face as his laugh sounded through the gym. When he spotted you, his eyes lit up even brighter and he came running. “BABYYY!!” He shouted, laughing as he sprinted to your side of the gym. Bokuto is very hyperactive. One second he’s on the other side of the gym, the next second he’s right in front of you. His muscly arms wrapped around you, squeezing tightly to lift you up. He spun you around before placing you back down, pulling you in for a kiss.

Bokuto’s eyes had hearts and stars in them as his lips broke away from yours, only to pull you into his chest for a big bear hug. “I saw you, babe!” He chuckled, waiting for you to shower him in praise like a puppy.

|||♡₊˚ 🦉・₊✧||| 𝓝𝓸𝓽𝓲𝓬𝓮
